summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Roll-as-SSOT (KN_15) fixes for D1 (intra-warehouse transfer), D2 (cycle count), and D3 (manual inbound). All backend API flows passed with integrity gate confirming balance == Σ rolls (0 FAIL). Frontend UI loads correctly with demo login working, but WMS navigation requires improvement for better accessibility.

design_issues.issue: Navigation to 'Operasi Gudang (WMS)' and 'Stok & ATP' menu items not easily accessible via Playwright selectors. Menu items visible in sidebar but text selectors timeout.
design_issues.note: This is a testability issue, not a functional bug. Manual navigation works, but automated testing is challenging.

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login (admin@kainnusantara.id)
Backend: D1 - Intra-warehouse transfer creation (reserves rolls at source)
Backend: D1 - Source available qty reduced immediately after transfer creation
Backend: D1 - Transfer approval workflow
Backend: D1 - Multi-stage progression (picking → staging → dispatched → completed)
Backend: D1 - Rolls physically moved to destination warehouse
Backend: D1 - Integrity gate PASSED (62 checks, 0 FAIL) after transfer
Backend: D1-neg - Insufficient stock correctly returns HTTP 409
Backend: D2 - Cycle count session creation
Backend: D2 - Cycle count item addition with expected_qty and owner_entity_id
Backend: D2 - Cycle count adjustment (+7 surplus)
Backend: D2 - Adjustment creates roll (not bare balance increment)
Backend: D2 - Movement has roll_id (roll-linked)
Backend: D2 - Integrity gate PASSED (62 checks, 0 FAIL) after cycle count
Backend: D3 - Manual inbound WMS task creation
Backend: D3 - Task creates inventory_roll (status=available)
Backend: D3 - Roll count increased after inbound
Backend: D3 - Integrity gate PASSED (62 checks, 0 FAIL) after inbound
Backend: Regression - Inter-company transfer still works (ownership transfer)
Frontend: Demo login buttons present (admin, manager, warehouse)
Frontend: Admin demo login successful
Frontend: Dashboard loads correctly
Frontend: No JavaScript errors on page

success_percentage.frontend: 75% (4/4 basic tests passed, navigation accessibility needs improvement)

ssot_invariant_verification.description: The critical SSOT invariant (balance == Σ rolls) was verified 3 times using verify_data_integrity.py after D1, D2, and D3 flows. All checks passed with 62 PASS / 0 FAIL.

d1_transfer_verification.description: Intra-warehouse transfer correctly implements roll-based SSOT: reserves rolls at source on creation (available drops immediately), progresses through multi-stage workflow (waiting_approval → approved → picking → staging → dispatched → completed), and physically moves rolls to destination warehouse with owner unchanged.
verified_behaviors: POST /api/transfers reserves rolls at source (available_qty drops)
Status 'completed' moves rolls to destination as available
GET /api/inventory/rolls shows moved rolls at destination
Insufficient stock returns HTTP 409 with detail message

d2_cycle_count_verification.description: Cycle count correctly implements roll-aware adjustments: creates/modifies inventory_rolls (not bare balance $inc), links movements to rolls via roll_id, and maintains owner_entity_id throughout the process.

d3_inbound_verification.description: Manual inbound WMS task correctly creates inventory_roll (not bare balance increment): POST /api/wms/tasks with flow_type='inbound' creates an available roll, returns roll_id in response, and the roll is queryable via GET /api/inventory/rolls.

regression_verification.description: Inter-company transfer (ownership transfer) still works correctly: POST /api/transfers/inter-company creates transfer, approve executes ownership change (owner_entity_id changes from source to dest), and status becomes 'completed' in one step.
